stories.headline: Federal Council signs Bilaterals III dispatch
stories.summary: The government forwarded the treaty package to Parliament, opening formal debate on Switzerland-EU relations.
stories.display_body: The Federal Council forwarded the Bilaterals III dispatch to Parliament today, formally opening debate on the treaty package governing future Switzerland-EU relations.
stories.why: This is the first concrete parliamentary step for a deal years in the making.

stories.headline: New retrieval-augmented reasoning paper lands on arXiv
stories.summary: Researchers report a method that cuts hallucination rates on multi-hop QA benchmarks by double digits.
stories.display_body: A new arXiv preprint proposes a retrieval-augmented reasoning method that cuts hallucination rates on multi-hop QA benchmarks by double digits, with code released alongside the paper.
